problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors — specifically Photodynamic therapy targeting — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
